vendor_context: Anker competitor (portable power stations, solar generators, home backup power)
status: ACTIVE — Global DTC brand; dominant in portable power station / solar generator category

networks.name: Awin
networks.notes: Primary global affiliate network. Multi-market: US, CA, AU, UK, EU (DE, FR, ES, IT), ZA. Program profile at ui.awin.com/merchant-profile/59181. Full toolset expected (banners, datafeeds, deep links).

networks.name: Commission Factory
networks.notes: Listed on Commission Factory for AU and ROW markets. Likely mirrors Awin rate or regional equivalent.

networks.name: Direct (EcoFlow.com)
networks.notes: EcoFlow runs a direct program at us.ecoflow.com/pages/affiliate-program. Minimum 5% per qualifying sale. 7-day cookie (shorter than Awin's 30-day). Apply direct; approval within 2-3 business days. Confirmed active as of 2026-04-23.

networks.name: CueLinks
networks.notes: Aggregator listing. Lower rate (3.15%) vs direct/Awin (5%) — standard aggregator haircut.

affiliate_program.commission_summary: 5% minimum on all sales (direct + Awin); 3.15% via aggregators
affiliate_program.cookie_note: 30 days via Awin; only 7 days via direct program — affiliates should join via Awin for better attribution
affiliate_program.aov_note: US direct page states 'over $1,000' AOV. Awin previously listed $1,500+. Using conservative $1,000 floor.
affiliate_program.contact_note: US program contact updated to affiliate@ecoflow.com (previously row.affiliate@ecoflow.com for ROW). May be separate US vs ROW contacts.
prohibited_promotions: PPC / SEM on brand terms (search engine placement)

home_upgrade_program.mechanics: EcoCredits incentive system — earned by adopting EcoFlow products, completing community activities, and contributing to Forum discussions
home_upgrade_program.redemption: EcoCredits redeemable for exclusive product discounts OR converted to financial contributions to non-profit partners
home_upgrade_program.creator_angle: EcoFlow collaborating with creators to document authentic household transformations (home energy resilience storytelling)
home_upgrade_program.significance: HIGH — New creator/community acquisition layer SEPARATE from traditional affiliate. Builds loyalty and social proof via forum + EcoCredits. Blurs line between customer advocacy and affiliate marketing.
home_upgrade_program.competitive_threat: EcoFlow is recruiting the exact same creator/content audience Anker SOLIX needs. Home resilience storytelling + EcoCredits loyalty lock-in is a differentiated play Anker has not matched.

company_status.financial: STABLE — Private, China-headquartered; strong global revenue, no distress signals
company_status.positioning: Market leader in portable power stations and solar generators. Positioned premium vs Jackery, direct competitor to Anker SOLIX line.

competitive_intel.commission_vs_anker: EcoFlow 5% vs Anker Amazon Associates ~1-4% — EcoFlow's direct program significantly outpaces Anker's primarily Amazon-dependent affiliate model.
competitive_intel.cookie_advantage: EcoFlow Awin: 30-day cookie. Anker mostly via Amazon (24-hour cookie). EcoFlow wins attribution window significantly.
competitive_intel.aov_advantage: EcoFlow AOV $1,000+ vs Anker average order ~$30-60 (consumer electronics). At 5%, EcoFlow yields ~$50+/sale avg. Anker at 3% on $50 = $1.50. EcoFlow is ~33x better affiliate payout per sale.
competitive_intel.new_threat_2026q2: Home Upgrade Program + EcoCredits (launched 2026-03-31) creates a loyalty/community moat around EcoFlow's creator base. This is a second-order affiliate play: creators embedded in the EcoFlow forum community are less likely to promote competing brands. Anker SOLIX has no equivalent community/creator loyalty program.
competitive_intel.affiliate_risk: LOW — Stable program, well-established on Awin, new Home Upgrade Program adds creator depth
competitive_intel.affiliate_mindshare: EcoFlow now running THREE creator acquisition channels: traditional affiliate (Awin/direct), influencer partnerships (brand-deal style), and Home Upgrade Program (community EcoCredits). Anker has at best one (Amazon Associates).
competitive_intel.opportunity_for_anker: Anker SOLIX must (1) launch managed affiliate program on Awin/Impact/CJ at 5%+ with 30-day cookie, AND (2) develop a community/creator loyalty layer to compete with EcoCredits. Current Amazon-centric model loses in every metric.

history.event: First audit. Confirmed Awin as primary global network at 5% commission, 30-day cookie, $1,500+ AOV. Direct program at EcoFlow.com also active (5% min, 7-day cookie). Commission Factory active for AU/ROW. CueLinks aggregator listing at 3.15%. Company stable, global expansion ongoing.

Second audit. Core affiliate terms UNCHANGED (5% Awin, 30-day cookie; 5% direct, 7-day cookie). NOTABLE: Home Upgrade Program launched 2026-03-31 — new EcoCredits community/creator incentive system hosted on EcoFlow Forum. Non-profit partners: Footprint Project, Convoy of Hope. Home Improvement deals campaign active April 8-28. Contact email confirmed as affiliate@ecoflow.com on US program page. This represents a new creator acquisition and loyalty channel not present at last audit.
history.change_detail: Home Upgrade Program + EcoCredits launched 2026-03-31 — community/creator loyalty layer on top of existing affiliate program
